initiation_judgment.basis: Sanofi's unsolicited March 22, 2016 outreach preceded any board-directed sale process and started the sequence that later became Medivation's controlled strategic process.
initiation_judgment.source_text: On March 22, 2016, Olivier Brandicourt, Chief Executive Officer of Sanofi, contacted David Hung, M. D., President and Chief Executive Officer of Medivation, on an unsolicited basis, and requested a telephone discussion.

advisor_cooley.source_text: Cooley LLP (" Cooley"), Medivation's legal advisor

advisor_j_p_morgan.source_text: J. P. Morgan Securities LLC (" J. P. Morgan"), retained as independent financial advisor to Medivation

advisor_evercore.source_text: determined to engage Evercore Group L. L. C. (" Evercore") as an additional independent financial advisor to Medivation

advisor_wachtell_lipton.source_text: Wachtell, Lipton, Rosen & Katz (" Wachtell Lipton"), which Medivation had retained as an additional legal advisor

advisor_richards_layton_finger.source_text: Richards, Layton & Finger, P. A., Medivation's Delaware counsel

advisor_weil_gotshal.source_text: Weil Gotshal & Manges LLP (" Weil Gotshal"), Sanofi's legal counsel

count_reconciliation.assertion: 4 companies contacted J. P. Morgan and Dr. Hung in late March 2016
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match numerically through the four extracted Company 1-4 bidder placeholders, although the filing does not explicitly map the late-March contacts to those later labels.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 11 industry participants contacted by J. P. Morgan and Evercore in late June through early July 2016
count_reconciliation.note: Only Pfizer and Company 1-4 are individually represented among the advisor-contacted parties; the filing leaves six additional contacted participants unnamed.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 1 industry participant contacted directly by Medivation in late June through early July 2016
count_reconciliation.note: The twelfth participant contacted directly by Medivation is never individually identified in the chronology.
Counts match exactly: Pfizer plus Company 1, Company 2, Company 3, and Company 4.
Only six bidder counterparties are individually represented in extraction (Sanofi, Pfizer, and Company 1-4); the filing counts the remaining parties only in aggregate.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 4 other bidders below Pfizer's final price
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly: the four non-Pfizer bidder actors in the extract are Company 1, Company 2, Company 3, and Company 4.
